review_rationale: Residual-blind source/protocol review. The minimal fast-SPARC baryonic stress carrier is acceptable as the predeclared transfer carrier for the post-review launcher. Li et al. NFW-fit products should remain control-only because no separate leakage policy justifying their use as the active carrier was provided. This response does not use endpoint residuals, endpoint scores, baseline ranks, or post-hoc curve-improvement reasoning, and it does not validate Tau Core by itself.
